stem: Points Q and R lie on a circle with center P. The radius of this circle is 9 inches. Triangle PQR has a perimeter of 31 inches. What is the length, in inches, of QR ?
explanation: Since P is the center and Q and R are on the circle, PQ and PR are radii of length 9 each. The perimeter is 9 + 9 + QR = 31, so QR = 31 − 18 = 13.
